hf8e11ec9gdbc0g4757g8dc7g139c9a0f2d69: May Master Halsin rest in the Deep Forest.
h159cee4cg66cag40feg9649g6dfd33065a79: I'll stay here until Master Halsin returns. I still believe he's out there somewhere.
h70d794c2gdf93g469egae32g0198bc155cdb: Silvanus be with you, my friend.
hd81c988bga3eag4205gbf82gd7b61ef02849: I was certain your parasite had taken hold.
hdf466d6agba61g4cfcgb0b0gabfcd7e33069: Thank you for saving Master Halsin. For saving my home. For everything.
h6abac288g0294g4405ga3e9gf021643b0a54: Thank you for saving my home.
ha3aafe6agd3a8g4750g85e0g870d8b7577e5: I'm still waiting for an apology for trying to kill me.
hb0023f83gc07eg4e90g9e6ag88b8735cc512: I am sorry for that, but the whole grove was at risk.
h511fd08cg8692g49fdg9d10gdd4338e0de07: You're just lucky I didn't swig that poison.
h8c51fbb3ge59fg4495g97c7g2d5469f73483: Hah! Look, I'm sorry. I didn't know what to do when you told me about that tadpole.
hec6e24d6gf517g4fe0ga3fcgdeaf2076f546: This place... this place means everything to me.
h4b5c2527g14f3g4adegbf06geb02ccb52363: Thank you for saving it. For saving Master Halsin. For everything.
h8bf1c88bg7262g4808g9f39gf1b3a89d2c87: I don't know if I can ever restore Silvanus' peace to this place.
h8b8c641ag91bag4b92g87f2g2aa319df465d: But I'll have the chance - thanks to you.
h7b0e9cc6g8f06g47ecgaf4ag55cae9e466e0: Damn right. If not for me, you'd all be dead.
hba637a77gfe6ag4283g8fcbgf4f742ada763: I was sure we wouldn't live to see the morrow.
hacb92942g53d6g4f7ag85ccg6cc40d02a620: Thanks are fine. A reward is better.
he53795edg9971g41a2gbad0g8f44f4d53aa9: If you're looking for coin, you're out of luck. I'm a healer, not a moneylender.
h2d404a44gfd79g4838g9f9bg160d6559cfaf: But here - to mend any hurts.
h121aac64g0266g4360gb263gf5161d2f9010: It was a glorious fight! One to be relished.
h880f38ecgc463g4457g9bcbg522d764a8015: I'm glad you were on our side.
hce8f68b5gef9fg440cgb541g68cb5a05e6c1: It's your home. It's worth protecting.
hc6f04c65ge5b5g4f93g976eg115dd5878aa6: Too right. Home is where you belong, not where you're born. This - this is where I belong.
hfb20a766g12f9g4236gbf41g7025c61c218c: I fought for the refugees, not for you.
hac3771cdgae12g4aa9gba23g8d6d0982858f: Whatever your motives, my home is still standing - because of you. I'll always be grateful for that.
hfbaff0c4g7ccdg4e66g924egf4259aef63f3: It was a pleasure to crush some goblin skulls.
h66d6ea73g5762g4c82ga1e0g04176b1099e8: Well, you certainly took out more than your fair share.
h9a8afcf0ga0beg4b75g96e6ga8d8e65fa2f4: This is a sacred place - it had to be protected.
hd3796388gf0bfg41b4gbe62gaf2c862bc7f4: Still, there would be little more than ashes left of the grove without you.
h8d1d3bd7g76fag4e46gbd47g5de5806396cf: Every death was in service of my god.
h143fa0afga3d2g4e82gbda2g0dc3d29d9799: I... hoped you'd had other motives, but I'll take what I can get.
ha8dc7ad6g9cb2g4e4eg9d91g46d3e83ed324: Of course, it's my duty to help those in need.
hcd8e79cdg19ecg415cg8a22g3d7198d2041f: And bloody hells, did we need it.
h6f2bcdabgc827g4ceegb088g468324c586e6: The goblins may be gone, but it cost Master Halsin his life...
h6bdf0470gd952g4142g8963gdef82b568f28: I'm sorry neither of us could save you from that tadpole. I hope it ends well for you.
h4b147df4gfc6dg4d01gb503g077ec61fb059: I don't know how we'll go on, but we must. For him.
hb9e8d01fga9a0g465egb6f9g598b779b33ce: Blessed day, I was worried I'd never see Master Halsin again.
hbb16021dgd8bbg4d53g966dg104c38f66d6f: You kept your word. Thank you.
h06662268g31c5g4698ga388g96b49652de9c: I'm still not comfortable with your tadpole, but I owe you a chance. Thank you.
h6d9cc78dgbd42g4215g9917gba352bfef2c8: Thank you for everything you've done.
h71dcd1adg7e05g43e0ga096ge59704fad6d5: Whatever about the grove, I won't be at peace until Master Halsin returns.
